column1: # OWASP ZAP baseline rule config for jt-glogarch.
# The release gate (scripts/zap-scan.sh) fails on ANY Medium/High risk alert.
# Only add IGNORE lines here for genuine false positives, WITH a written reason.
# The app is hardened to pass with NO ignores. Security controls:
#   - CSP without 'unsafe-inline' (no inline scripts/handlers/styles; all via
#     external JS event-delegation + CSS classes/CSSOM). object-src 'none',
#   - Session cookie Secure + HttpOnly + SameSite=Strict; anti-CSRF token on the
#     login form; COOP/COEP/CORP set; Cache-Control no-store; Server banner off.
# (No rules are currently downgraded or ignored.)
